business_ideas.idea: Dollar bills with celebrity faces etched via sticker, sold on eBay for profit arbitrage
Luxury Airbnb portfolio: 20+ high-end properties ($50M+ AUM) with premium experience
Mealime: Meal planning app acquired by Albertsons for tens of millions
Tenzing: Modern investment bank for bootstrap founders $1-5M EBITDA
Non-binary term sheet: Venture round that adjusts valuation down if milestones missed

predictions.text: Overnight success is real; some founders hit millions in revenue within 6-12 months
Location/proximity to talent clusters matters significantly early in career
Luck is partially controllable; founders with ops background become better investors
Ivy League networks deliver lasting ROI even with debt burden
Technical skill in one domain (coding, design, copywriting) is non-negotiable for founders
